# Just Enuff Cabaret

> Just Enuff Cabaret is a premier gentlemen's club (strip club) in Rockford, Illinois,
> at 1609 S Alpine Rd, Rockford, IL 61108. Open 7 nights a week, 4 PM to 2 AM.
> Adults 21+ only with valid government-issued ID. Phone: (815) 399-4600.
> Email: info@justenuffcabaret.com.

Just Enuff Cabaret offers professional entertainers performing nightly, a VIP seating
section overlooking the stage with premium bottle service (Veuve Clicquot, Dom Perignon, Ace of Spades, Clase Azul),
a full late-night kitchen on Friday through Sunday (wings, pizza, cheesesteaks, tacos;
pizza and mozzarella sticks available every night), birthday and bachelor
party packages, and free on-site parking. Located minutes from I-90, I-39, and US-20,
it serves guests from Rockford, Loves Park, Machesney Park, Belvidere, Rockton,
Beloit, Janesville, Chicago (~90 min), Elgin (~55 min), Aurora, DeKalb,
Lake Geneva (~45 min), Madison (~70 min), and Milwaukee (~85 min).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the club, featured entertainers, and VIP packages
- [The Club](/club): Venue details: main stage, VIP seating, bar, kitchen, parking
- [Dancers](/dancers): Current roster of entertainers
- [Events](/events): Upcoming events and party nights
- [VIP Packages](/vip): VIP packages, bottle service, and reservations
- [Menu](/menu): Full bottle service and food menu with prices
- [FAQs](/faqs): Hours, cover, dress code, parking, directions, reservations
- [Contact](/contact): Address, phone, map, directions from nearby cities, parking
- [Apply](/apply): Entertainer auditions and staff applications
